title: Sour Flaky Jamaican Ciabatta Sandwich
description: A plant‑based sandwich that blends tangy pickled cabbage, smoky jerk spices, and flaky ciabatta, finished under a broiler for a crispy, satisfying lunch.
instructions: Preheat oven broiler to high and position rack 4 inches from heat source.
Slice the ciabatta loaf lengthwise, leaving a hinge to hold sandwich together.
In a small bowl, whisk lime juice with jerk seasoning, salt, and pepper. Drizzle over sliced avocado and toss gently to coat.
Spread hummus on the inside of each ciabatta half.
Layer vegan cheddar slices, avocado, and pickled cabbage on the top half.
Top with the second ciabatta half and press gently to align the fillings.
Brush the outer surfaces of the sandwich with olive oil.
Place sandwich on an oven‑proof baking sheet and slide under broiler for 3‑4 minutes, turning once, until cheese melts and ciabatta edges turn golden‑brown.
Remove from oven, let rest 1 minute, then slice into individual servings.
Serve immediately, optionally with a side of fresh mango salsa.
